title: BMD-45 Bengaluru CCTV validation sample
geography: Bengaluru Safe City CCTV camera network
checksum_sha256: computed in evidence/cctv_bmd45_report.json for downloaded local files
provenance_contact: AIM@IISc public Hugging Face dataset; PTIS project owner for local sample validation
privacy_review: Published BMD-45 release states frames are anonymized/redacted; PTIS stores only the public validation sample and COCO annotations
notes: This dataset validates real Bengaluru CCTV vehicle-detection evidence. It is not an anonymized vehicle trajectory, OD, or field replay dataset.
